summary: Two REQ-001.1 tests exercise the real dispatch_harness_auth in sh (only setup_pi_auth stubbed); one confirms outfitter's output is exactly [notice, pi-auth-flow] with no fallthrough, the other forces the profiles-mkdir to fail and asserts 'unsupported' is absent — both would fail against the pre-fix code (mkdir failure -> return 1 -> unsupported), a genuine counterexample-rejecting check.
